##LOCALITY=School Section #32 mine, Grand County, Utah, USA,
##OWNER=Natural History Museum of Los Angeles County
##SOURCE=Tony Kampf
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow and transparent thin hexagonal plates forming sunburst-like aggregates and tightly intergrown balls. Tyope sample, described in Kampf et al (2025)
